feedback.text: Numerous games I have enjoyed could potentially, if luck is not on the side of the developers, have their servers shut down, for example, Sky: Children of the Light and Albion Online. Neither of these games could work without active servers and I greatly enjoy playing them and spending time with friends I have made in them. If the worst were to come to pass, the existence of a private fan server would be an invaluable tool to me and potential thousands of others.
